creator: ejk@iki.fi
text:
Update net/wireshark port from 1.6.5 to 1.6.8.

Please note that I have not tested the net/wireshark port building etc.

I have only installed, ran successfully and deinstalled cleanly on
the net/wireshark-lite "child" port.

How-To-Repeat: cd ports/net/wireshark                                                          
make install
